routingPolicy: Active docs consume the global Codex multi-agent lane contract. Current direct user policy routes every new or resumed Codex-owned worker to gpt-5.6-sol at medium effort by default, permits higher Sol effort for harder work, and forbids Terra/Luna fallback or lower effort without a newer direct user instruction.
currentFocus: Generate anonymous ignored local OBJ previews with the integrated CMSH profile-v0 parser, obtain a human Aquila selection, and then verify the selected ignored role through the guarded Godot bridge. Keep textures, retail terrain, and Retry 13 outside this slice.

currentDocsTruth.release: v1.0.9 remains the latest published unsigned portable WinUI ZIP with 949 packaged Lore documents; this source slice does not publish a release.
currentDocsTruth.product: WinUI 3 is the primary preservation/modding GUI. The separate GPL rebuild has a deterministic Core/headless verifier and one playable procedural Godot .NET First Flight client; Electron, WPF, and the old Python GUI/CLI remain archived references.
currentDocsTruth.winUiFirstUse: CURRENT_CAPABILITIES.md and its byte-identical Lore mirror record the verified three-state setup hierarchy, preservation of temporarily unavailable remembered folders, manual Save Lab availability, shell status/focus ownership, Level 1 headings, compact wrapped source actions, truthful launch/Admin Level preset state, and demand-loaded Media VLC behavior. Save Lab Game Options now gives the official Steam Input modern-controller setup path, in-game binding/sensitivity steps, browser-labeled Ziggurat guide action, copied-options-only nonclaim, and raw numeric controller-config caveat.
currentDocsTruth.filesystemSafety: Save/options, AppCore copied-executable patching, and generated asset/package outputs use bounded roots, guarded or staged writes, final verification, recoverable full-file backups, and explicit same-user post-finalization limits.
currentDocsTruth.patchContract: The normative contract accounts for 29 catalog rows, 20 visible options, 9 hidden companions, 17 dependency edges, and 118 conflict edges. AppCore accepts only exact pinned mutation rows and preserves atomic backup/checksum/apply/restore behavior. The normal Windowed & Mods journey keeps compatibility, two bounded player mods, source/Create/receipt/Play/Stop, and local split-screen. A full-width collapsed Lab owns five purpose groups for patch experiments, launch/control, online research, music experiments, and BEA-only diagnostics. Visible status and confirmation count only next-copy inputs; copied-options values are immutable pre-confirm snapshots. Required compatibility rows remain checked/locked, ten constrained two-column actions wrap fully at 760px, and the native smoke rejects stale default-path builds. No patch bytes or AppCore injection semantics changed.
currentDocsTruth.re: reverse-engineering/ is canonical. The integrated Ghidra closeout verifies the stable 6,411-function inventory and 459-address endpoint delta, reviews 92 unique proposed corrections, applies and exactly reads back 91 confirmed rows, rejects the erroneous 0x004dac90 manifest row, applies the separately leased 0x0050b9c0 structured prototype correction, and verifies complete pre/post stores. The recovered Cursor ledger remains incomplete, static metadata is not runtime/parity proof, and 0x004dac90 remains bounded metadata debt. The camera/movement/morph candidate is explicitly runtime-required and orders four cheaper observations before implementation. Exact stale CMonitor pairs at 0x00411630 and 0x00411aa0 are removed from active mixed mutators and guarded without retiring unrelated operations.
currentDocsTruth.runtimeObserver: The approved design progresses from an exact-specimen Level 850 identity canary to controlled raw-state observation and then Level 100 corroboration. Tasks 1-4 provide PE32-safe fingerprints, strict sanitized materialization, exact receipt-bound CDB/input identity, the locked unpatched protocol, and authority-gated fixed-role orchestration. Task 5 has twelve preserved failed runs and no published matrix. Retry 12 passed exact specimen/process/module/fingerprint, managed-stop, hash, and cleanup checks but stopped on repeated post-quit NatVis unload diagnostics; it proves no Q causality. The strict path-bound repeated-NatVis grammar correction is integrated at 82bbc2c0. Retry 13 remains unauthorized unless a later measured behavior contract directly needs it. Stage A still excludes timing, field semantics, handling, and parity claims.
currentDocsTruth.referenceCorpora: The pinned audit records Onslaught 5352a81 as an incomplete architecture corpus and AYAResourceExtractor 53b10b0 as Stuart master plus one narrow rectangular-DDS copy-bound correction. AYA remains a Windows x86 static model/texture exporter with format, fixture, build, mutable-dependency, and component-license gaps; neither reference is Steam behavior or completeness authority.
currentDocsTruth.lore: The published ZIP still contains 949 Lore documents. The current tracked packable corpus contains 955 documents across 11 classified families, with zero unclassified and nine preserved canonical/projection divergences. The generated inventory emits reviewed metadata signals only; it does not establish editorial completeness, freshness, rights clearance, public safety, or historical truth.
currentDocsTruth.rebuild: The GPL-3.0-or-later RE-informed source rebuild includes the deterministic net8 Core/headless verifier, pure real-time Client adapter, and playable procedural Godot 4.7 First Flight view. Transform, energy, shield, movement, arena, and default presentation choices remain synthetic. Main also contains an ignored presentation-only Godot bridge for bounded self-contained GLB or custom-parsed OBJ meshes with content-addressed roles and manifest-last activation. A redacted local inventory parsed all 213 loose AYA archives and disproved the first strict CMSH profile. The accepted fixture-backed static-preview profile-v0 parser and deterministic geometry-only OBJ emitter are integrated at 4c815373 with 23 Python tests and one pure C# OBJ safety test; guarded publication rejects stale sessions, source races, reparse paths, malformed/capped inputs, and rolls back fatal failures. It establishes format support only. No tracked evidence identifies an Aquila body, so anonymous local preview generation and human selection remain the next step. Visual Studio, Blender, FBX, DDS/textures, textured GLB, and LNDS terrain are separate later contracts. This does not prove asset origin, visual fidelity, handling, or parity. The completion target remains one reproducible BYO-asset, evidence-backed playable vertical slice, not full retail parity, and the client is not in the published v1.0.9 WinUI ZIP.
currentDocsTruth.curatedSourcePackage: The curated artifact is a self-contained, plain non-Git convenience package over the already-public canonical repo, not a replacement checkout or a private/public legal cut. The accepted First Flight source candidate selected 721 files, materialized 726 files with export metadata, excluded the real game-generated save baseline, and passed standalone payload/inventory, docs, npm test, notices, and hygiene gates.
